name: list_payments
description: Retrieve a list of payments with filtering by date range, source, and other criteria. Supports pagination to handle large result sets.

parameters.name: begin_time
parameters.description: Optional. Start of the time range for filtering payments (RFC 3339 format, e.g., 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z).

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Optional. End of the time range for filtering payments (RFC 3339 format).

parameters.name: sort_order
parameters.description: Optional. Sort order for results: DESC (newest first) or ASC (oldest first).

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Optional. Pagination cursor for retrieving the next page of results.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Optional. Maximum number of results to return (1-200, default 100).
